violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. - Observed a dry hand sink near the chicken breading station. - Observed no change of gloves/handwashing after coming back inside.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Clean all reach in units - hot and cold - defrost freezer units.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. - Deep clean exteriors of equipment on the lines. - Clean all rolling racks, carts. - Clean the drive thru soda station.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Deep clean the system.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Deep clean floors below and behind equipment on the lines. Deep clean walk in cooles and freezer floors.
General premises. — --Food establishment and all parts of the property in connection with their operation were not kept free from litter. - Degrease the sidewalks around and under the grease barrels.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. - Hang mops to air dry vs on the floor.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Sides and the underside of the fryers need to be cleaned. Rolling racks need to be cleaned.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Water spicket in the mop sink area was leaking at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors in the dish pit area need to be cleaned. Walk-in floors for both the coolers and the freezers need to be cleaned. Wall behind the 3 compartment sink is discolored and needs cleaning. Floors under fryer and kitchen equipment need to be cleaned.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mops were lying on the ground and not placed where they could dry adequately.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
